p2p_enrich.notes: Added 6 repo CI/CD pass-to-pass gates: test_repo_pyproject_toml_valid (TOML syntax validation), test_repo_ruff_lint (ruff 0.14.9 linter), test_repo_ruff_format (ruff 0.14.9 formatter), test_repo_engine_syntax_valid (all engine files syntax check), test_repo_no_trailing_whitespace (whitespace check), test_repo_file_ends_with_newline (EOF newline check). Discovered CI commands from .github/workflows/pre-commit.yml: ruff check, ruff format, and various pre-commit hooks. Pytest tests require torch/megatron dependencies not available in lightweight image. All 16 tests (4 f2p + 6 original p2p + 6 new p2p) pass after gold fix.

validate.notes: All 4 validation checks passed: (1) Docker build succeeds, (2) NOP test reward=0 - 4 fail-to-pass tests correctly fail on buggy base code (SyntaxError: duplicate kwarg), (3) Gold test reward=1 - all 16 tests pass after fix applied, (4) Rubric judge ICR=1.0 - gold solution follows style rules (no config file changes needed for this bug fix).
